description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-tabs

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tabs/`
**Sub-components:** hx-tab, hx-tab-panel

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Tab text, active indicator, hover, border. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. tablist/tab/tabpanel roles. aria-selected. aria-controls/labelledby. Keyboard (arrow keys, Home, End). Auto/manual activation.
3. **Functionality** — Tab selection. Panel association. Closeable tabs. Scrollable tab list. Icons. Badges. Disabled tabs. Vertical tabs.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Active indicator animation. Scroll overflow. Responsive.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All three sub-components documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Selection. Keyboard. ARIA linking. Closeable. Scroll.
8. **Storybook** — Basic. With icons. Closeable. Scrollable. Vertical.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Vertical tabs replacement. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-tabs
